userReportedFailure: failed to process HLS during video upload

findings.evidence: Kestrel MaxRequestBodySize is WorkVideoPolicy.MaxVideoBytes plus multipart overhead; FormOptions.MultipartBodyLengthLimit is WorkVideoPolicy.MaxVideoBytes.
HLS endpoint routes through general /api/ but general /api/ blocks lacked 300-second proxy timeouts while backend HLS timeout is 300 seconds.

validations.command: npm test -- --run src/test/work-editor.test.tsx -t "surfaces HLS processing errors|sanitizes existing-work HLS upload failures"

blockedValidations.reason: local WSL environment has neither nginx nor docker installed

runtimeTriage.413: old image/config or another proxy body limit
runtimeTriage.onlyValidMp4: app MP4 validation rejected file header/content
runtimeTriage.unableToProcessMp4IntoHls: ffmpeg ran and rejected source media, likely codec/container compatibility in copy-mode HLS

recommendation: Promote the nginx timeout fix through dev, main, and GHCR, then retest the same failing MP4 and capture exact status/body if it still fails.
